steps.message:
You are using an iPhone simulator. Complete this iOSWorld task.

Goal: Search for 'The Godfather' in Cinephile and add it to my Wishlist. What's the year and rating?

Primary app bundle IDs for this task:
- cinephile: com.iosworld.benchmark.cinephile

Only the app(s) required for this task are installed. Use the launch(bundle_id) tool to open apps when useful. Use the preloaded Jordan Avery profile data when the task needs user data. When complete, call done(success=true, message="...") and include any requested answer or confirmation in the message.
I'll launch the Cinephile app and search for 'The Godfather'.
